profiles.displayName: OHT 85 / IUCLID JSON preview for pesticide residue dossiers
notes: This profile is a staged JSON preview for validation and field-mapping review only.
No claim of OECD Harmonised Template or IUCLID XML equivalence is made by this profile.

mappedFields.note: Preferred substance name can be passed through directly.
Stable MCP contributions are carried as a derived validation-only preview structure.

unsupportedFields.reason: Import-template diagnostics do not have a stable OHT or IUCLID slot in this preview profile.
unsupportedFields.suggestedAction: Retain in internal review bundle only.
